Document:
# Viral Outbreak Protocol
1. Medical Personnel should begin by equipping the necessary PPE such as mask gloves and turning their internals to avoid airborne diseases.
2. Most diseases are unable to be detected by the crew monitor or medical hud during their first stages.
3. Once patients start presenting symptoms medical huds and crew monitors will begin detecting them and assigning them an illness icon.
4. Once patients present with symptoms grab a sample with a swab and head to your DiseaseDiagnoser2300 to get a disease report.
5. All cure steps must be fullfilled in order to attempt the cure process.
6. Once you have a cured patient grab a blood sample in a vial from the patient and head to your PanD.E.M.I.C 2300. Insert the vial in the machine and gather the materials to create a vaccine injector.
